title: Galilee Severe Event Trigger
secondary_condition: Optional shaking intensity threshold in selected northern population centers
trigger_logic_summary: Triggers when an earthquake with magnitude 6.5 or above occurs within the Galilee North Zone, subject to depth and optional shaking conditions.
use_case: Illustrative rapid sovereign liquidity for a major northern earthquake event.
source_note: Illustrative scenario design based on Israel earthquake risk context.

title: Dead Sea Transform / Jordan Valley Trigger
secondary_condition: Optional shaking intensity threshold in the Jerusalem corridor / Jordan Valley reference grid
trigger_logic_summary: Triggers when an earthquake with magnitude 6.7 or above occurs within the core Dead Sea Transform zone, subject to depth and optional severity overlay conditions.
use_case: Illustrative sovereign trigger for a fiscally material event along the main fault system.
source_note: Illustrative scenario design for sovereign earthquake risk transfer.

title: National Catastrophic Event Trigger
secondary_condition: Optional national shaking footprint or exposure-weighted severity condition
trigger_logic_summary: Triggers for an extreme national earthquake scenario meeting catastrophic threshold conditions.
use_case: Illustrative tail-risk sovereign protection for a catastrophic national earthquake event.
